title: Add relation guard goldset
goal: Create relation goldset tests for relation classes without completeness claims

acceptance.assertion: The slice is implemented or explicitly closed against current main/PR state with no hidden broadening.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: RepoBrief boundaries are preserved: no hidden refresh, no Git mutation in RepoBrief core, no review/runtime correctness claim.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: Relevant tests/checks are run, or a precise blocker/gap is recorded.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: The output states what the evidence does not establish.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

metadata.outcome: Verified existing Lenskit relation guard goldset on origin/main.
validation: python scripts/proofs/guard_relation_goldset_eval.py -> reports tests_by_name and validates_schema diagnostic metrics with non-claims

verified_acceptance.rbv1-t014-scope-bound: Existing Lenskit origin/main contains the diagnostic goldset, evaluator, proof and tests; no new scope broadened.
verified_acceptance.rbv1-t014-boundary-preserved: Goldset and evaluator are diagnostic only and do not persist relation cards or create correctness/review/runtime claims.
verified_acceptance.rbv1-t014-tests-or-gap: pytest -q merger/lenskit/tests/test_grg_goldset.py passed; evaluator ran successfully.
verified_acceptance.rbv1-t014-non-claims: Proof and evaluator preserve non-claims for test sufficiency, runtime correctness, regression absence, schema runtime equivalence and review completeness.
